ROSE GUARD - Password Security Testing Tool
========================================

Thank you for using ROSE GUARD! This tool helps you test and evaluate password security.

Installation Instructions
------------------------
1. Keep the entire ROSE_GUARD folder together - all files are necessary
2. You can move the ROSE_GUARD folder anywhere on your computer
3. Double-click ROSE_GUARD.exe to start the program

Quick Start Guide
----------------
1. Launch ROSE_GUARD.exe
2. Enter a password in the "Password to Test" field
3. Select a wordlist (or use the default one provided)
4. Choose an attack method:
   - Dictionary Attack (Green): Tests against common passwords
   - Brute Force (Red): Tries all possible combinations
   - Hybrid Attack (Blue): Combines dictionary and brute force

Features
--------
- Multiple attack methods
- Real-time progress tracking
- Detailed security analysis
- Report generation
- Dark/Light theme support

Troubleshooting
--------------
If the program doesn't start:
1. Make sure all files remain in the ROSE_GUARD folder
2. Ensure your antivirus isn't blocking the application
3. Try running as administrator

For support or questions, please contact the developer.

Note: This tool is for educational and security testing purposes only. 
Do not use it for unauthorized access attempts.
